arts.sum: Sparta Prague play their first competitive game in over a month and they'll look to build upon a run of three wins in their last four. That said, they have lost their last four in the Champions League...

arts.ttl: Inter Milan to Challenge AC Milan for Torino Talent Samuele Ricci
arts.sum: Samuele Ricci has emerged as one of the top Italian midfielders in Serie A, attracting attention from major clubs. The 23-year-old recently celebrated his 100th appearance for Torino, showcasing his growth into a versatile and quality midfielder over the past three years. The post Inter Milan to Challenge AC Milan for Torino Talent Samuele Ricci appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: 10 Champions League talking points as Liverpool eye history and Jurgen Klopp wants revenge
arts.sum: The Champions League returns on Tuesday after more than a month, with Liverpool currently leading the way and Manchester City at risk of missing out on the knockout stages

arts.ttl: Kerry Schoolboy/girl league: Under 14 girls secure home semi-final in inter-league
arts.sum: After a dramatic extra-time period in Christy Leahy Park, the Kerry Under 14 Girls booked their ticket to an All Ireland Inter League semi-final at home to South Belfast. Mastergeeha emerged victorious 2-0 in a tight contest away to Listowel Celtic, with Éabha Moynihan and Lucy Devine finding the net to secure a valuable win for the visitors.
